reasoning: FIDE publishes its official Elo ratings once a month, typically on the 1st day of the month. The Wikipedia page 'FIDE rankings' mirrors these official lists, specifically noting 'The top 20 players were ranked on 1 March 2026 as follows:'. Thus, the rating on Wikipedia on 2026-03-15 and 2026-03-22 will just refer to the static official list released on March 1st. As such, Levon Aronian's rating on the Wikipedia page will not change during this period. Furthermore, even if real-time rating updates were used, gaining ~27.3 Elo points (1% of 2729) in one week is practically unheard of for an elite Grandmaster. The probability is safely estimated at the lower bound of 0.02.
